post.summary: Create inventory history snapshots for a patrol
post.description: Create one or more inventory history snapshots scoped to a patrol. Accepts an array `inventories` to create multiple rows in one call. Each inventory item may include `photos` referencing files (new or existing) using the same shape used elsewhere in the API.

inventories.description: Array of inventory snapshot objects to create in the context of the patrol.

inventoryId.description: Identifier of the inventory item to which this snapshot belongs (required).

inventoryOrigin.description: Optional origin or source identifier for the inventory (e.g., manual/import).

snapshot.description: Optional arbitrary JSON snapshot of the inventory state (items, counts, metadata).

isComplete.description: Flag indicating supervisor verified this inventory as complete. Used by auto-close logic when true.

observation.description: Optional free-text observation or note provided by the supervisor.

inventoryCheckedDate.description: Date when the inventory was checked/verified (ISO date).

photos.description: Array of file descriptors. Each item can reference an existing file by `id` or provide a `privateUrl` for a freshly uploaded file.

new.description: True when this file descriptor represents a newly uploaded file (client-side).

id.description: Existing file id (use to reference previously uploaded files).

name.description: Original filename or label for the file.

sizeInBytes.description: Size of the file in bytes.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the file (e.g., image/jpeg).

privateUrl.description: Private storage URL returned by the upload flow; server will persist this into the file table.

publicUrl.description: Optional public URL for previewing the file.

post.summary: Confirm inventories for a patrol and attempt auto-complete
post.description: Supervisor confirms that inventory snapshots for the patrol are ready. This endpoint evaluates applicable inventories and, if all are verified (`isComplete === true`), marks the patrol completed.

200.description: Patrol auto-complete evaluated; returns status message.

400.description: Not all inventories verified or validation error.
